text:
Alright. There once was a bear who lived underground.

One autumn morning, our dear furry friend went out into the woods because they smelled something wonderful.

There was a feast. They did a lot of gnashing teeth. The berries were juicy. Then lots of worms burrowed there. They wiggled vigorously.

There were leaves too. He thought a crunch sounded nice. It came easy with those sharp claws. He ate.

But then it was too late.

Darkness came. Leaves rustled outside his cozy burrow.

He could hear crunching. Something heavy.

What if...

Big owl!

He huffed sideways. Didn think he'd think so silly?

But owl had round sunglasses.

Owl just knew.

One eye closed.

Something shiny on fur.

Owl swooped.

It reached.

A tail.

Felt soft.

He got one!

Something soft!

Not feather soft!

Flea! That's what stole!

What luck!

It'd jump!

Just don't bite
